title: Include arch in release zip/tarball filename
body:
Fixes #11417

Namely: Includes the go-architecture name in the release filename.  This
is needed esp. for 'darwin' where there are now multiple architectures.

LGTM
Should we build for the other arches as well?

> Should we build for the other arches as well?

This is a valid concern, and I really have no idea if it will work or not w/ these changes :confused:  Though I'm happy to open a jira card to explore this addition further.

LGTM
and happy green test buttons.
In case it wasn't clear: I intend to open another PR to add a new task for cross-compiling a release for ARM64 (I'll also need to update the release doc).
Found a problem (it's not actually building for the intended architecture).  Fixing...
